ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "command_name" TEXT /* Name of the command (e.g., BAL, BILL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the command's purpose */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the command type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inbound_commands" (
  "inbound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inbound command */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the command type */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the command */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the command (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  "request_data" TEXT /* Request data (e.g., parameters, message body) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inbound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inbound_commands_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the command type related to the response */,
  "reply_message" TEXT /* Message sent back to the user for invalid requests */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_responses_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "total_commands" INTEGER /* Total number of commands received on the given date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the command type */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the command type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the command type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the command type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "inbound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inbound command */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response sent */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the command (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_inbound_id FOREIGN KEY ("inbound_id") REFERENCES inbound_commands ("inbound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES command_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the command this parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_parameters_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_blobs" (
  "blob_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blob */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the command this blob belongs to */,
  "blob_data" TEXT /* Binary data associated with the command */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the blob was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the blob was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blob_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_blobs_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the command this audit entry belongs to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the command (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_audit_trail_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
